description: User is observing the live video call session and participant's screen share within the Askable interface. The participant, Sophia, appears to be navigating a website while the researcher watches.
interaction_target: Video call and screen share feed
frame_description: The screen displays an active Askable session. A recording timer is visible at the top, incrementing from 00:36:25 to 00:37:01. The main view shows the participant's shared screen, and a smaller window on the right shows the participant's webcam feed.
